title: Malty Crispy French Mars Bar Tart
description: A sweet and indulgent tart that combines the flavors of Mars Bar with a crispy, malty crust, perfect for a weekend brunch. This recipe is dairy-free friendly and features the use of a comal as a vessel to add an extra layer of crunch to the dish.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Transfer the puff pastry to the preheated comal and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and crispy.
Meanwhile, melt the chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval until smooth.
Once the pastry is cooked, let it cool for 2 minutes before spreading the melted chocolate over the top.
Sprinkle the cut Mars Bar pieces over the chocolate, followed by a pinch of salt and a drizzle of coconut oil.
Transfer the tart to a wire rack to cool completely before serving.
Serve immediately, garnished with a sprinkle of sea salt if desired.
